119
artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA 'Generator Faceplate' showing operational status selection for 'Generator No.1' between 'Stopped' and 'Running'.
artifact_blurb: A detailed view of the Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) system's 'Generator Faceplate' module, specifically monitoring the real-time operational state of 'Generator No.1' with a binary status selector toggling between 'Stopped' and 'Running' modes.
